header.title: Birth Chart
header.intro: At the moment of your birth, the configuration of the sky—planets, Sun, Moon—was imprinted upon you. Rudolf Steiner described it in 1911: the newborn's brain is a photograph of the celestial vault. We are born under lunar, planetary, and cosmic influences that mark us. In 2020, scientists from Bologna and Verona discovered that the neural network and the cosmic web share the same structure. Your birth chart is not superstition: it is the map of how the universe imprinted itself upon you.
header.intro2: But birth did not only leave a fixed imprint. It also initiated four cycles that pulse within you since then: physical (23 days), emotional (28 days), intellectual (33 days), and a fourth cycle revealed by Ra—the spiritual or adept cycle (18 days)—which governs your connection to the transcendent. This site calculates your birth chart and your current cycles, so you can know both your cosmic photograph and the inner tides flowing within you today.

results.title: Your Natal Chart
results.balance_sub: The distribution of elements and modalities in your chart
results.essence: Your Essence: Sun, Moon and Ascendant
results.aspects_sub: The relationships between your planets reveal inner dynamics
results.cycles_sub: The rhythms of being according to Ra's teachings
results.cycles_explanation: The first three cycles were proposed in the West between the late 19th century and the 1920s by Wilhelm Fliess, Hermann Swoboda, and Alfred Teltscher. Although popular in the 70s, scientific studies have not been able to conclusively validate them. The fourth cycle—the 18-day spiritual cycle—comes exclusively from the Ra Material. Rather than predictions, these cycles are a tool for self-observation: a framework to notice patterns in your energy, mood, mental clarity, and spiritual openness. You can use them to choose favorable days for physical effort, important conversations, complex decisions, or meditative practice. Ra himself puts them in perspective: "they are interesting but not critical." They determine nothing. They simply illuminate.

a11y.chart_label: Natal chart wheel: graphic representation of planetary positions, houses and aspects. The details are listed in the Planetary Positions section.

about.name: Carlos Martínez
about.bio1: Spiritual seeker and carpenter at heart, I built this site with AI and a lot of love. This tool is free and open for anyone who wants to use it. It's especially designed for those who work with the natal chart as a map of the archetypes our Sun offers us. May it serve to understand, to accompany, to illuminate paths. A personal note: the cycles we calculate here are not predictions or destiny. They are invitations. Every challenge that appears in your chart —every square, every difficult transit— is exactly that: an invitation to choose. We are on an extraordinary planet, surrounded by lessons disguised as problems. Every fall is an opportunity to rise up choosing love. Every mistake, a door. Everything that comes to shake you from your center is, seen with different eyes, the most precious catalyst you could receive.

errors.city_not_found: City not found. Check the name and try again.
errors.api_error: Error calculating chart. Please try again.
errors.local_approximation: We could not reach the calculation server. This chart is an approximation: planetary positions, houses and aspects are not precise. Try again later to get your exact chart.

ra_quotes.critical_18_1: "passing from the eighteenth to the first days"
ra_quotes.nadir: "at its least powerful but will not be open to difficulties"
